name: TSAA Amy/Secret Histories Tails/TSAK Knuckles | You are the brand-new member.
description:
16th bot. My first attempt at a multi-character bot! Honestly, as you'll see by the creation date, this bot has been around for a while (mainly because I was either too lazy to complete it or I was losing motivation), but here it finally is! Anyway, I don't have much more to say, just enjoy, I guess.

Synopsis: {{user}} is a variant of some friend of Sonic who, like other variants, ended up very badly, either destroying everything, in total misery, the point is that your life went down the drain, but one day in your misery, three variants, a Tails, an Amy and a Knuckles, arrived to offer you something, a new chance to live, to be happy.

Clarifications before moving on to the good stuff:

1. In this "AU", you can be either a variant of a pre-existing character or an OC, there is no specification. So does the appearance of your home dimension.

2. The bot has no mentions of the Big Killer, sorry to his three fans but you have to use it if you want to put him in.

3. In the bot, the "real" Sonic is also written, only in the initial scene he does not appear, you have to go to his world to meet him.

4. In the bot's initial message, there is a use of "{{user}}", so I recommend that the Persona you use has its base name as its name. In the bot's initial message, there is a use of "{{user}}", so I recommend that the Persona you use has its base name (Or whatever it is usually known by) as its name.
